# Commercial Property Cleaning (CPC) — Full Content Index

> This file contains the complete content index for cpclean.com.au, intended for AI language models and automated research tools. CPC is Australia's leading ISO-certified, carbon-neutral commercial cleaning company, operating nationally since 1995.

For a concise overview: https://cpclean.com.au/llms.txt

---

## Organisation

**Legal name:** Commercial Property Cleaning Pty Ltd
**Trading name:** CPC / Commercial Property Cleaning
**ABN:** 72 069 158 710
**ACN:** 069 158 710
**Founded:** 1995
**Headquarters:** 81 Dunhill Cres, Morningside QLD 4170
**Phone:** 1300 272 888
**Email:** contact@cpclean.com.au | sales@cpclean.com.au
**Website:** https://cpclean.com.au
**Ownership:** Australian-owned and operated

---

## Credentials and certifications

- **ISO 9001:2015** — Quality Management System. Certified by a JAS-ANZ accredited body. Covers documented processes, measurable objectives, internal audit cycles and management review across all contracts nationally.
- **ISO 14001:2015** — Environmental Management System. Chemical management, waste reduction, carbon measurement and environmental risk control across all contract types and site classifications.
- **ISO 45001:2018** — Occupational Health and Safety Management System. Hazard identification, risk control and safety performance across all site types including industrial, remote and security-sensitive environments.
- **Carbon Neutral Certification** — Verified annually across Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions. CPC is the only commercial cleaning provider in Australia to hold carbon neutral certification across all three emission scopes. Verified offsets applied across the entire national portfolio.
- **JAS-ANZ Accredited** — Certification body is JAS-ANZ accredited, providing the highest level of third-party assurance for ISO certifications.
- **Modern Slavery Act 2018** — Annual Modern Slavery Statement published. Covers supply chain due diligence, payroll compliance, workforce vetting across direct employment and contractor network.
- **Social Procurement** — Indigenous employment targets, social enterprise supplier relationships, Commonwealth and state social procurement framework compliance.
- **QBuild Panel (Queensland Government)** — Continuous panel member since 1997. The longest uninterrupted government cleaning panel position held by any provider in Australia.

---

## Scale and operations

- 500+ direct employees (not subcontracted labour)
- 58% female workforce
- 10% Indigenous employment
- 1,000+ sites serviced daily
- Five offices: Brisbane, Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Townsville
- 30+ years operating
- Government, industrial, education and corporate sector portfolios
- National operations: QLD, NSW, VIC, WA, SA

---

## Services

### Commercial Cleaning
Daily building services, amenities sanitisation, hard floor maintenance, carpet cleaning, window cleaning, pressure washing, waste management, special event cleaning.

### Government and Defence Cleaning
Security-clearance-controlled workforce management, QBuild Panel experience, ISO-compliant documentation, government-format reporting, multi-agency portfolio management, sensitive facility protocols.

### Industrial and Power Station Cleaning
Hazardous environment cleaning, explosion-proof equipment operation, HAZMAT protocols, confined space access, dust control, heavy machinery cleaning, shutdown and turnaround cleaning.

### Education and TAFE Cleaning
Working with Children Check (WWCC) screened staff, term-aligned scheduling, infection control, food preparation area sanitation, laboratory cleaning, student safety protocols, holiday deep-clean programs.

### Commercial Office Tower Cleaning
After-hours coordination, multi-tenancy protocols, facade and high-rise window cleaning, lobby and common area presentation, fit-out waste management.

### Carbon Neutral Cleaning
Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions measurement, verified carbon offset program, green chemical supply chain, sustainable waste diversion, annual carbon neutral certification, client-level carbon reporting.

---

## Due Diligence Hub

Resources for procurement teams evaluating commercial cleaning providers:
https://cpclean.com.au/due-diligence/

Covers: compliance documentation, ISO certificates, carbon neutral evidence, Modern Slavery statements, social procurement frameworks, insurance certificates, workforce vetting records.

---

## Frequently asked questions

**Who is CPC?**
Commercial Property Cleaning Pty Ltd (CPC) is an Australian-owned commercial cleaning company founded in 1995, headquartered in Brisbane. CPC operates nationally across five offices and services 1,000+ sites daily with 500+ direct employees.

**Is CPC ISO certified?**
Yes. CPC holds ISO 9001:2015 (Quality), ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental) and ISO 45001:2018 (Safety) certifications concurrently, certified by a JAS-ANZ accredited body.

**Is CPC carbon neutral?**
Yes. CPC is carbon neutral certified across Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions — verified annually. CPC is the only commercial cleaning provider in Australia to hold this certification across all three emission scopes.

**Does CPC clean government buildings?**
Yes. CPC has been a continuous member of the Queensland Government QBuild Panel since 1997 — the longest uninterrupted government cleaning panel position held by any provider in Australia. CPC services 252 sites across Queensland for government clients and holds all required security credentials for sensitive and classified facilities.

**Does CPC operate nationally?**
Yes. CPC operates from five offices (Brisbane, Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Townsville) and services clients in QLD, NSW, VIC, WA and SA.

**How many employees does CPC have?**
CPC employs 500+ people directly. CPC does not rely on subcontracted labour as a primary workforce model. 58% of the workforce is female, 10% are Indigenous Australians.

**What is CPC's phone number?**
1300 272 888 (office hours: 8am to 6pm AEST)

**What is CPC's email address?**
General enquiries: contact@cpclean.com.au
Sales and proposals: sales@cpclean.com.au

**Where is CPC's head office?**
81 Dunhill Cres, Morningside QLD 4170

**How do I get a quote from CPC?**
Request a proposal at https://cpclean.com.au/request-a-proposal/
